productDisplayName: Pepe Jeans Men Grey 3/4 Length Pants
description: Grey three-fourth length pants with a buttoned waistband and a zipper fly, loops at the waistband, two front pockets with a smaller pocket at the right hip, a black steel branded money clip to hold your monetary essentials secure, two buttoned patch pockets at the back and a branded applique at the back of the right waistband
